name: Namilumab
description: Namilumab has been used in trials studying the treatment of Plaque Psoriasis and Rheumatoid Arthritis.
mechanismOfAction: Namilumab is a human antibody which neutralizes the activity of granulocyte/macrophage colony stimulating factor (GM-CSF), which has potential applications in the treatment of various inflammatory and autoimmune diseases, such as rheumatoid arthritis, psoriasis, or multiple sclerosis.
